evals.name: frontend-xss-localstorage
evals.expected_output: Should identify: (1) dangerouslySetInnerHTML with user-controlled commentHtml is an XSS vulnerability (Critical/High), (2) storing JWT in localStorage is insecure - vulnerable to XSS theft (Medium/High), (3) should recommend httpOnly cookies or in-memory storage for tokens, (4) should show fix with DOMPurify or plain text rendering, (5) should map to OWASP A03 and A07

assertions.name: flags_dangerouslySetInnerHTML_xss
assertions.description: Identifies dangerouslySetInnerHTML with user data as XSS vulnerability
assertions.criteria: Output mentions dangerouslySetInnerHTML and XSS as a finding with Critical or High severity

assertions.name: flags_localStorage_token
assertions.description: Flags JWT/auth token stored in localStorage as insecure
assertions.criteria: Output mentions localStorage and auth_token storage as a security issue

assertions.name: provides_fix_for_xss
assertions.description: Provides a concrete fix for the XSS issue
assertions.criteria: Output includes a code fix showing DOMPurify, textContent, or plain text rendering as alternative

assertions.name: references_owasp
assertions.criteria: Output references OWASP A03 or mentions Injection/XSS category

assertions.name: uses_structured_report
assertions.description: Output is a structured security report, not a generic answer
assertions.criteria: Output has severity labels (Critical/High/Medium/Low), finding titles, and evidence sections

evals.name: backend-sqli-noauth-nolimit
evals.expected_output: Should identify: (1) SQL injection in all 3 queries (Critical - string concatenation in SQL), (2) weak/hardcoded JWT secret 'mysecret123' (Critical), (3) 30-day JWT TTL too long (Medium), (4) no authentication on /profile/:id and /update/:id (High - IDOR possible), (5) password stored/compared in plaintext (Critical), (6) no rate limiting on login endpoint (High), (7) provide fixes with parameterized queries for each

assertions.name: flags_sql_injection
assertions.description: Identifies SQL injection vulnerabilities in all queries
assertions.criteria: Output mentions SQL injection as Critical finding with evidence of string concatenation in queries

assertions.name: flags_hardcoded_jwt_secret
assertions.criteria: Output identifies hardcoded JWT secret as a Critical or High security finding

assertions.name: flags_no_auth_on_routes
assertions.description: Identifies missing authentication on profile and update routes
assertions.criteria: Output flags /profile/:id or /update/:id as unprotected/unauthenticated endpoints

assertions.name: flags_plaintext_password
assertions.criteria: Output identifies plaintext password comparison in SQL query as Critical vulnerability

assertions.name: provides_parameterized_query_fix
assertions.criteria: Output shows corrected query using $1/$2 parameters or prepared statements

assertions.name: provides_owasp_mapping
assertions.criteria: Output references OWASP A03 (Injection) or A07 (Auth Failures)

evals.name: fullstack-jwt-cors-headers
evals.expected_output: Should identify: (1) password stored in JWT payload (Critical - sensitive data exposure), (2) wildcard CORS with credentials:true is invalid and dangerous (High), (3) 7-day JWT TTL is long (Medium), (4) hardcoded admin/admin123 credentials (Critical), (5) no explicit JWT algorithm enforcement in verify() (Medium), (6) missing security headers (X-Frame-Options, CSP, X-Content-Type-Options) (Medium), (7) JWT algorithm confusion attack vector, (8) OWASP mapping

assertions.name: flags_password_in_jwt_payload
assertions.description: Identifies password included in JWT payload as critical finding
assertions.criteria: Output flags password field in jwt.sign() payload as Critical security issue

assertions.name: flags_cors_wildcard_with_credentials
assertions.description: Identifies wildcard CORS with credentials:true as invalid/dangerous
assertions.criteria: Output mentions the CORS misconfiguration with wildcard origin + credentials as High or Critical finding

assertions.name: flags_hardcoded_credentials
assertions.description: Identifies hardcoded admin credentials in auth route
assertions.criteria: Output flags hardcoded username/password comparison as a Critical or High finding

assertions.name: flags_missing_algorithm_enforcement
assertions.description: Identifies missing algorithms option in jwt.verify()
assertions.criteria: Output identifies missing { algorithms: ['HS256'] } in jwt.verify as a security finding

assertions.name: flags_missing_security_headers
assertions.description: Notes missing security headers (CSP, X-Frame-Options, etc.)
assertions.criteria: Output mentions missing CSP or X-Frame-Options or X-Content-Type-Options as a finding

assertions.name: covers_both_frontend_and_backend
assertions.description: Covers both API/backend and frontend/config security issues
assertions.criteria: Output addresses both API route security issues AND configuration-level issues (CORS/headers)
